data.title: 国际服Instagram关注数里程碑活动
data.summary: [Blue Archive Follower Milestone Celebration Event!] Thanks to all the love and support you've shown
data.body:
[Blue Archive Follower Milestone Celebration Event!]

Thanks to all the love and support you've shown us on the official Blue Archive Instagram,
we’ve prepared a follower milestone event!

Every time we reach a milestone, special rewards will be given out—so please stay tuned and keep the support coming~ 💎

➡️ Learn more:  https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3063246

#BlueArchive
